title: BitNet-TT session 10: Phase 2 deeper — manual SDPA via ttnn primitives
goal: Replace ttnn.transformer.scaled_dot_product_attention with explicit Q@K/sqrt(d) + causal_mask + softmax + @V primitives. Tests whether the fused SDPA kernel's internal softmax/reduction divergence is the drift source. If manual SDPA closes more of the gap, we have an actionable target without full kernel rewrite.
constraints: Gate behind BITNET_MANUAL_SDPA env flag; default OFF.
Only apply to prefill path (measured path); decode path unaffected.
Same capture harness from sessions 8-9 measures sub-op RFE change.

stories.title: Implement manual SDPA helper in attention.py
acceptanceCriteria: Add _manual_sdpa(q, k, v, scale, is_causal) that does explicit matmul+softmax+matmul via ttnn primitives.

stories.title: Measure PCC + tps with manual SDPA
acceptanceCriteria: Record delta PCC and delta tps.

stories.title: Re-run per-op RFE localization with manual SDPA
acceptanceCriteria: pcc_localize.py with BITNET_MANUAL_SDPA=1 shows updated L0.post_self_attn RFE.
Identify whether the 0.240 RFE drops, and by how much.

stories.title: Commit + decide next step
acceptanceCriteria: If PCC improves by ≥0.005: keep default ON, declare Phase 2 win.
If unchanged or worse: document + cancel.
